Application For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Jerry Lipskin, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Trinet HR Corporation,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Results.com USA, Inc., a Delaware Corporation,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $67,959.02
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,686.54
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $534.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $75,004.56

Judgment signed in open court.
